posts.author: KoNLiG (Omer Ben Tzion)
posts.cookedHtml:
I created a board column extension, and when attempting to open the view itself it just doesn’t do anything.
I suspect it’s something related to monday.com, since my application worked perfectly fine with the feature a few days ago, and now it seems to be broken.
Thank you.
